reference: It may be a viral fever, which should subside on its own in about a week. However, if it goes on for more than a week, or if any associated symptoms such as irritability, decreased activity, crying during urination, or refusal to eat develop, get him evaluated by a doctor.
text: It may be a viral fever, which should subside on its own in about a week. However, if it goes on for more than a week, or if any associated symptoms such as irritability, decreased activity, crying during urination, or refusal to eat develop, get him evaluated by a doctor.
